title: Files: add a configurable file provider to centralize file opening, download and preview
description: File actions can now go through a single file provider obtained with getFileApi()/useFileApi() instead of building meta-file URLs and passing connection data manually. A default online provider (AopFileApi) is registered out of the box, and a GatewayFileApi allows chaining several providers with automatic fallback to the first available one, laying the groundwork for offline file handling (new AppMobileOffline app config).
